mapper.insert: insert into batch.compensation_command ( tenant_id, command_no, compensation_type, target_id, job_code, biz_date, batch_no, related_job_instance_id, related_file_id, approval_id, operator_id, reason, strategy, command_status, trace_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, finished_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{commandNo}, #{compensationType}, #{targetId}, #{jobCode}, #{bizDate}, #{batchNo}, #{relatedJobInstanceId}, #{relatedFileId}, #{approvalId}, #{operatorId}, #{reason}, #{strategy}, #{commandStatus}, #{traceId}, #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorKey}, #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: update batch.compensation_command set command_status = #{commandStatus}, related_job_instance_id = #{relatedJobInstanceId}, related_file_id = #{relatedFileId}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, finished_at = #{finishedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
